'''bagomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cecaelia|cecaelia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-g-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cecaelia|cecaelia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| bagomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bægemeth|bægemeth]] || [[word:bægemej|bægemej]] || [[word:bægemesh|bægemesh]] || [[word:bægeme|bægeme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bagogomoth|bagogomoth]] || [[word:bagogomoj|bagogomoj]] || [[word:bagogomosh|bagogomosh]] || [[word:bagogomo|bagogomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bagomoth|bagomoth]] || [[word:bagomoj|bagomoj]] || [[word:bagomosh|bagomosh]] || [[word:bagomo|bagomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bagofmoth|bagofmoth]] || [[word:bagofmoj|bagofmoj]] || [[word:bagofmosh|bagofmosh]] || [[word:bagofmof|bagofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bagomotho|bagomotho]] || [[word:bagomojo|bagomojo]] || [[word:bagomosho|bagomosho]] || [[word:bagomoko|bagomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bagomoth|bagomoth]] || [[word:bagomoj|bagomoj]] || [[word:bagomosh|bagomosh]] || [[word:bagomo|bagomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bagomothol|bagomothol]] || [[word:bagomojol|bagomojol]] || [[word:bagomoshol|bagomoshol]] || [[word:bagomokol|bagomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bagomothotho|bagomothotho]] || [[word:bagomojojo|bagomojojo]] || [[word:bagomoshosho|bagomoshosho]] || [[word:bagomoko|bagomoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bagomothon|bagomothon]] || [[word:bagomojon|bagomojon]] || [[word:bagomoshon|bagomoshon]] || [[word:bagomokon|bagomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bagomothoro|bagomothoro]] || [[word:bagomojoro|bagomojoro]] || [[word:bagomoshoro|bagomoshoro]] || [[word:bagomokoro|bagomokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
